song.title: Thirst
song.lyrics:
[V1] Wash over me like a tidal wave Clean out what pulls me to the grave nothing left that You don't love Take me whereYour river flows Heal the desert in my soul Let it wash over my feet All I'm asking for is just a drink
[V2] Spirit of the living God Would You fall afresh like rain on us Burst the doors and flood the halls Into forgotten rooms inside our hearts And we will all be swept away In the current of Your love and grace Living water flow to me All I'm asking for is just a drink
[C] I thirst for You Yes my soul it thirsts for You Even as the deer is panting for the stream Even more my soul is thirsty I thirst for You
[B] One thing I ask and I would seek to see You there in front of me With nothing standing in the way. Just me before You unashamed One thing I ask and I would seek to see You there in front of me With nothing standing in the way. Just me before You unashamed
[B] Just me before You unashamed Just me before You unashamed
[E] And I thirst for You. I thirst for You You're the well that won't run dry. Only You can satisfy I thirst for You I thirst for You Living Water flow through me, all I ask is just one thing I thirst for you
